---
title: "Tools"
pagetitle: "Tools | Mesfin Genie"
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
description: "Interactive decision-support and economic-evaluation tools developed by Mesfin Genie."
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Tools</p><h1>Decision support and economic evaluation</h1><p>Interactive applications for policy analysis and applied research.</p></div></header>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell tool-page-grid"><article class="tool-page-card"><div class="tool-meta">Vaccine policy · Version 4.4.1 · Live</div><h2>eMANDEVAL Future</h2><p>Compares prospective vaccine-mandate designs using predicted public support, expected lives saved, benefit–cost outcomes and policy trade-offs.</p><dl class="tool-credit"><div><dt>Developer</dt><dd>Mesfin Genie</dd></div><div><dt>Research programme</dt><dd>MandEval</dd></div></dl><a class="button-primary" href="/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Launch eMANDEVAL ↗</a></article><article class="tool-page-card"><div class="tool-meta">Farm economics · Version 2026.18 · Live</div><h2>SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</h2><p>Evaluates farm practices and soil-management interventions using net present value, benefit–cost ratio, return on investment and sensitivity analysis.</p><dl class="tool-credit"><div><dt>Project lead and publisher</dt><dd>Dr Frank Wogbe Agbola</dd></div><div><dt>Developer</dt><dd>Mesfin Genie</dd></div><div><dt>Project</dt><dd>CRC High Performance Soils Project 1.2.008</dd></div></dl><a class="button-primary" href="/farming-bca-tool-v18/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Launch SOIL CRC tool ↗</a></article></div></section>
```
